signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

The long-running SEC legal battle against Ripple has been officially dropped, removing a significant regulatory overhang that had suppressed XRP's price for years[1]. This resolution represents a fundamental shift in market sentiment and has cleared the path for institutional adoption[1].

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Completed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Completed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple has officially completed the full-scale rollout of its RLUSD stablecoin across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of April 19, 2026[2]. This launch is driving record-breaking transaction volumes on the XRPL and attracting massive capital inflows to the ecosystem[2].

Price Movement Context**

The price started April near $1.20 and has gained steady traction throughout the month[1].
